title: Discrete Mathematics - Set Theory and Algebra - Boolean Algebra

questions.question:
If \( B \) is a Boolean algebra, then which of the following is true?



Set Theory & Algebra: NIELIT 2017 July Scientist B (IT)
options: \( B \) is a finite but not complemented lattice
\( B \) is a finite, complemented and distributive lattice
\( B \) is a finite,distributive but not complemented lattice
questions.correct_answer: \( B \) is a finite, complemented and distributive lattice
